prestazioni: MAHLE Motorsport forged pistons (MAH-40830.001) with 12.5:1 compression ratio for the 4.0L MA1.76 (982.22) naturally aspirated flat-six, paired with Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (PN: CR-86526H) and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs (PN: 234-4701) to handle 550+ WHP on E85 with a KMS 32U standalone ECU

Titanium exhaust system by Akrapović (PN: S-PO718CG4T-110) with 70mm carbon-fiber tips, 304 stainless steel headers, and a valved center muffler bypass for a 12-15 HP gain and 8.5 kg weight reduction over OEM

Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers (PN: ÖH-PO718) with 24-way adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20mm front/15mm rear ride height adjustment, and spherical bearing top mounts, paired with Eibach 300 lb/in front and 450 lb/in rear springs (PN: E40-02-000-01-25 & E40-02-000-02-25) for track-focused alignment (-2.5° front camber, -2.0° rear camber)
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (PN: RB-PO718-03) with carbon-fiber fenders (2.5-inch front, 3.5-inch rear flares), custom front splitter, and ducktail spoiler, finished in Porsche GT3 RS Python Green (29B) with satin black accents

BBS FI-R 9.5x20 ET40 (front) and 12.5x20 ET50 (rear) forged wheels (PN: BBS-FIR-9520-40 & BBS-FIR-12520-50) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/20 front, 325/30/20 rear) with custom center-lock adapters

Recaro Pole Position carbon-fiber bucket seats (PN: 3832000 900) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses (PN: 4046.10), paired with a custom roll cage by Matter Fab (9-point, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly) and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, PN: 01112011133)
